creator: lankfordandrew@charter.net
text:
Bah, I got your portcategory mixed up your origin 
("portcategory/portname"), nevermind.  Nothing to see here, move along.

Mind you, it would be nice if by default "pkg_info obscureport"  would 
print a synopsis in the form of "Information for 
portcategory/oscureport-version ...".
